question: List the titles of books in ascending order of the ratings in review?
sql: SELECT Title FROM book JOIN review ON book.Book_ID = review.Book_ID ORDER BY review.Rating ASC;

back_translation.intent: 获取书籍的标题，按评论的评分升序排列

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求列出书籍标题并按评论评分升序排列，SQL反向翻译描述正确指定了使用book和review表，选择Title列，按review.Rating升序排序，且无过滤条件或分组需求。
